#nullable enable

namespace Demo;

public partial class M
{
    public partial global::Demo.Dst Map(global::Demo.Src s)
    {
        if (s is null) throw new global::System.ArgumentNullException(nameof(s));
        return new global::Demo.Dst
        {
            X = s.X,
            Y = s.Y,
        };
    }
}
